prompt:
Subject: sunlit cafe portrait of a smiling woman

Person/Expression: A woman in her 20s with a small face and soft contours, pale pink high ponytail with light see-through bangs, translucent skin, delicate Japanese-style makeup, gently narrowed eyes, a natural and friendly smile, and a slightly sweet gaze looking at the camera.

Clothing/Pose: white ribbed off-the-shoulder top with front gathers and ribbon detail, black mini skirt, and black long boots, a delicate necklace, sitting with one elbow on the table and a hand on her cheek, leaning her upper body slightly forward in a cute and relaxed pose.

Background/Lighting: A cafe by a large window with a view of a Japanese street, beige plastered walls, wooden chairs, a white round table, an iced latte on the table, a white handbag, a white smartphone, and a warm atmosphere with soft afternoon natural light.

Composition/Camera: Portrait 9:16 aspect ratio, nearly full-body seated portrait, slightly close composition, 35mm lens, slight low angle, shallow depth of field, natural snapshot feel, candid photography utilizing window light.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, natural skin texture, realistic AI portrait, Japanese-style portrait, soft sunlight, film photography style, soft highlights, clean tones, natural and sophisticated photographic expression.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural hands, distorted face, extra fingers, distorted body, excessive processing, overexposure, text, logos, watermarks, unnatural backgrounds, AI-specific distortions.
